params.description: Photo/illustration of a muffin tin appears on left side of screen. 2 rows, 4 columns — 2×4 arrangement.
Dot array appears on right side of screen. 2 rows, 4 columns — same 2×4 dimensions as muffin tin.

beats.text: Look at these two pictures. A muffin tin and a dot array. What expression describes them both by rows?
Which expression describes both by rows?
2 times 4. Whether it's muffins or dots, 2 rows of 4 is 2 times 4. The arrangement is what matters, not what's in the spots.

elements.description: Photo/illustration of muffin tin on left. 2 rows, 4 columns.
Dot array on right. 2 rows, 4 columns. Multiple choice tool active.
